title: ononis pusilla subsp. saxicola
intro: Ononis pusilla subsp. saxicola is a sub-species of the lesser burnet, a type of flowering plant in the legume family. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to help lower blood pressure due to its flavonoid and saponin content. The health benefits of Ononis pusilla subsp. saxicola include its potential to reduce inflammation and aid in the treatment of conditions such as hypertension, kidney stones, and urinary tract infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its roots or leaves in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
